archimate:ApplicationService.name: Digital Europe eSignature's DSS open-source library
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Description: DSS (Digital Signature Services) is an open-source software library for digital signature creation, validation, and extension, designed to help digital solutions achieve compliance with the eIDAS Regulation.
Publisher: European Commission
Source: https://ec.europa.eu/digital-building-blocks/wikis/display/DIGITAL/Digital+Signature+Service+-++DSS
LOST view: TVA-Trust Enablers [Motivation]
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DigitalEuropeESignaturesDSSOpen-sourceLibraryApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DigitalEuropeESignaturesDSSOpen-sourceLibraryApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/E-SignatureCreationApplicationService

properties.value: DSS (Digital Signature Services) is an open-source software library for digital signature creation, validation, and extension, designed to help digital solutions achieve compliance with the eIDAS Regulation.
